verdict: An exceptionally fluid and well-structured chart with outstanding stream flow, held back by a repetitive intro and a physically impossible hold-jump combination.

issues.problem: Holding the D panel while executing a UR JUMP requires pressing three panels simultaneously (D, U, and R), which is physically impossible to execute with feet alone without awkward bracketing.
The intro stream repeats the exact same D-U-L-R rotation six times in a row, making the opening feel lazy and repetitive.
